name: Sweet-And-Spicy Garbanzo Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans and water in a large pot. Soak overnight.
2. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and cook until tender, about 2 to 3 hours.
3. Add onion, yams, carrot, celery, and leek. Cook for 30 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients. Cook an additional 30 minutes.
Serving Suggestions:
Pour into individual bowls or over any whole grain. Also good as a topping for potatoes or whole-wheat bread.
Helpful Hint:
This dish can easily be made in a slow cooker. Add all ingredients at once and cook on the high heat setting for 8 to 10 hours. Be sure to soak the beans overnight before you begin.
